title: Audit Trail Capture (Human Resources)
acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Trail Capture" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit

workflow.name: Record-Lifecycle Workflow
workflow.stateTransition: Record-Lifecycle Workflow -> Human Resources -> Audit Trail Capture

business.reason: Supports the Record-Lifecycle Workflow business pattern for "Human Resources": Audit Trail Capture is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit
validations: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit
business.stateTransition: Record-Lifecycle Workflow -> Human Resources -> Audit Trail Capture
business.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Trail Capture" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Audit Trail Capture attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Audit Trail Capture attempted by a role without permission
Audit Trail Capture attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Audit Trail Capture succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Audit Trail Capture is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Human Resources is independently exercised against Audit Trail Capture.
permissionTests: Audit Trail Capture is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Audit Trail Capture -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-HUMANRESOURCES-08 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Human Resources Audit Trail Capture changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Audit Trail Capture succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Audit Trail Capture rejected with invalid data
Access: Audit Trail Capture rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
